description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-slider` (T1-13). 6/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-slider/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, min/max/step/value typing, range slider (two thumbs) if present, form association
2. Accessibility — `role="slider"`, `aria-valuemin`/`aria-valuemax`/`aria-valuenow`/`aria-valuetext`, keyboard (arrow keys, Page Up/Down, Home/End), touch draggable, axe-core pass
3. Tests — min/max/step constraints, keyboard navigation, value display, form association, disabled state
4. Storybook — single/range variants, step demos, value display
5. CSS — track/thumb styling, `--hx-*` tokens, focus ring on thumb, tooltip value display
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form-associated, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-slider/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-slider — T1-13 antagonistic quality review
